title: T-029 — Scanner inspect API POST /api/quality/scanner/inspect (06-SCN §8.5)
prompt:
# T-029 — Scanner inspect API

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §7.1 EPIC 8C, §8.1 SCN-070..073 contract, 06-SCN §8.5 (cross-module)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement the 4 scanner-bound HTTP routes that fulfil the SCN-070..073 contract: GET /api/quality/scanner/pending (queue), POST /api/quality/scanner/inspect (3-button result), POST /api/quality/scanner/fail-reason (7 reasons + notes → NCR auto-draft), GET /api/quality/scanner/done/:id (result screen).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/app/api/quality/scanner/pending/route.ts` GET returning pending inspection rows under PIN-auth session (06-SCN auth pattern reused). Filter assigned_to=session.user OR null AND status='pending'.
2. `apps/web/src/app/api/quality/scanner/inspect/route.ts` POST {lp_id, action: 'pass'|'fail'|'hold'} → if pass: completes a quick scanner inspection and signs; if hold: creates quality_holds with reference_type='lp'; if fail: creates inspection draft with result='fail' and returns next-step URL to fail-reason.
3. `apps/web/src/app/api/quality/scanner/fail-reason/route.ts` POST {inspection_id, fail_reason_code_id, notes} → completes + signs + auto-draft NCR via signInspection.
4. `apps/web/src/app/api/quality/scanner/done/[id]/route.ts` GET returns {inspection_id, result, ncr_ref?}.

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/api/quality/scanner/pending/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/quality/scanner/inspect/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/quality/scanner/fail-reason/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/quality/scanner/done/[id]/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/scannerHandlers.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/scannerHandlers.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a PIN-authed session with user role qa_inspector, when GET /api/quality/scanner/pending is called, then it returns up to 25 inspections assigned to the session user OR unassigned and status='pending', in priority+scheduled_at order
2. Given POST /api/quality/scanner/inspect {lp_id, action:'fail'}, when called with valid PIN session, then a quality_inspections row is created with inspection_type='scanner_quick' and result='fail' (provisional), and the response 200 includes next_url='/api/quality/scanner/fail-reason'
3. Given POST /api/quality/scanner/fail-reason {inspection_id, fail_reason_code_id, notes}, when fail_reason_code_id matches a scanner_visible=true row, then the inspection is signed (signature_hash set), an NCR draft is auto-linked, and the outbox event quality.inspection.completed is queued — all in one TX
4. Given a fail_reason_code_id pointing to a row with scanner_visible=false, when POST /api/quality/scanner/fail-reason runs, then it rejects with INVALID_REASON_FOR_SCANNER and writes nothing

pipeline_inputs.description: Scanner-bound 4 HTTP routes implementing SCN-070..073 contract: pending, inspect, fail-reason (auto-NCR), done.
pipeline_inputs.details: Next.js Route Handlers under /api/quality/scanner/* with PIN-auth session reuse (06-SCN §6). pending returns assigned/unassigned pending inspections. inspect dispatches by action: pass=quick-complete+sign, fail=create draft+redirect to fail-reason, hold=createQualityHold reference=lp. fail-reason calls signInspection (T-028). done returns persisted result + ncr ref. Validates fail reason as scanner_visible per T-002.
out_of_scope: Do not implement allergen changeover sign flow (T-051)
Do not implement offline replay (06-SCN §5 owns)
acceptance_criteria: Given a PIN-authed session with role qa_inspector, when GET /api/quality/scanner/pending is called, then it returns up to 25 inspections assigned to the session user OR unassigned and status='pending', ordered by priority then scheduled_at

Given POST /api/quality/scanner/inspect {lp_id, action:'fail'} with valid PIN session, then a quality_inspections row is created with inspection_type='scanner_quick' and provisional result='fail' and the 200 response includes next_url='/api/quality/scanner/fail-reason'

Given POST /api/quality/scanner/fail-reason with a scanner_visible=true reason, then the inspection is signed, an NCR draft is auto-linked, and outbox quality.inspection.completed is queued — all in one TX
Given a fail_reason_code_id pointing at scanner_visible=false, then POST /api/quality/scanner/fail-reason rejects with INVALID_REASON_FOR_SCANNER and writes nothing
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/scannerHandlers.test.ts asserting routes' shape, action dispatch, atomic NCR auto-draft, scanner_visible filter
risk_red_lines: Do not allow non-scanner-visible reason codes via the scanner endpoint
Do not skip outbox event on success (12-REP and 05-WH consume)
